Title: Collection & Disposal
Removal Services Needed
Disposal Request
Description: Had a request come in for disposal services. ~mission(Stops)You'll be expected to properly dispose of the ~mission(Item) after it has been collected either by selling it for processing or some other means.

We've got a disposal contract that's up for grabs. ~mission(Stops)It ain't the most glamorous gig, but hey, someone's got to clean it up, right? And at least it's honest pay. More than I can say for a lot of other jobs out there. Who knows, maybe you'll be lucky and find someone to buy the ~mission(Item) off you.
Standard disposal job. ~mission(Stops)It's up to you how you handle disposing of the ~mission(Item) after removing it. Sell it, save it. Don't really care. As long as it's gone, you get the credits.

Looking for a runner to remove some ~mission(Item). ~mission(Stops)Don't really have a preference for how you dispose of the stuff, so it's your choice if you trade it to a scrap dealer or just incinerate it.
Seems like there's a bunch of ~mission(Item) piling up that's ready for removal. ~mission(Stops)Standard pay plus whatever you can make selling the ~mission(Item). One time contract.
Stops: It's just one stop, so it shouldn't take too long.
Only one pick up this time.
It's only a single collection point and then you're done.
You'll be picking up from a few different locations.
It's a fairly simple route servicing a few locals.
One of our regulars normally does the stops on this route, but you'd be filling in for them.
